untranslatable_reason: Signal requires American option-specific derivatives (intrinsic value, time value decay, ex-dividend dates, option exercise mechanics). These are not equity price/technical indicators and cannot be expressed using the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires comparison to dynamic threshold 'underlying_price - strike_price' which requires real-time option chain data unavailable in standard OHLCV backtest engines.
translation_notes: This is a volatility arbitrage signal specific to options markets. It compares option market price to intrinsic value (parity) to detect early exercise opportunities and arbitrage mismatches. The core conditions (market_price < intrinsic_value AND time_value ≈ 0) require option-specific data structures not present in equity technical analysis indicators. A full implementation requires an options pricing module with access to strike prices, underlying prices, volatility surfaces, and dividend dates.
